zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，他的父親Thomas Bourne de Locke21歲，母親Ms Elizabeth de Holland21歲。他和Isabel de Gras至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1365年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，他的父亲Thomas Bourne de Locke21岁，母亲Ms Elizabeth de Holland21岁。他和Isabel de Gras至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1365年在英国英格兰越可爾享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Burn
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Bourn
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Bourne  .

variants.name: Born
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Heinz, Helmut, Berthold, Frieda, Friedrich, Fritz, Gerhard, Horst, Jutta.
English: variant of   Bourne  .
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French borgne ‘one-eyed, squint-eyed’.

variants.name: Cockburn
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bournes
meanings: English: variant of Bourne with plural or post-medieval exrescent -s.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

variants.name: Burne
meanings: English: variant of   Bourne  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Ripon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Rippon  .

variants.name: Rippon
meanings: English: habitational name from Ripon in Yorkshire. The placename means ‘amongst the Hrype’, from the Anglian tribe name Hrype, dative plural Hrypum, of obscure etymology.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne was born about 1280, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bourne de Locke, was 21 and his mother, Ms Elizabeth de Holland, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Isabel de Gras. He died in 1365, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne est né environ 1280, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bourne de Locke, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ms Elizabeth de Holland, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Isabel de Gras. Il est décédé en 1365, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne um 1280 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bourne de Locke 21 und seine Mutter Ms Elizabeth de Holland 21. Er hatte mit Isabel de Gras mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne è nato il circa 1280 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Bourne de Locke, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ms Elizabeth de Holland, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Isabel de Gras. Morì nel 1365, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourneが約1280年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Bourne de Lockeは21歳，母Ms Elizabeth de Hollandは21歳であった。彼はIsabel de Grasとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1365年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bourne de Locke(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ms Elizabeth de Holland(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Isabel de Gras(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bourne de Locke, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ms Elizabeth de Holland, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabel de Gras. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne родился около 1280 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Bourne de Locke было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ms Elizabeth de Holland, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Isabel de Gras. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas of Ripon De Bourne nació aproximadamente 1280, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Bourne de Locke, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ms Elizabeth de Holland, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Isabel de Gras. Murió en 1365, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
